# 4.6 Bill Text Downloader

Part of [Component 4 — Bills Pipeline Projects](../04-BILLS-PIPELINE.md) — Project C: `bill-text-pipeline`

Downloads actual bill text content from Congress.gov given a URL from a `BillTextAvailableEvent`. Handles all three text formats (Formatted Text, Formatted XML, PDF) and extracts plain text suitable for LLM consumption.

## Classes

### `BillTextDownloader[F[_]]`

```
class BillTextDownloader[F[_]: Async](
  client: Client[F],
  config: TextDownloadConfig,
  logger: PipelineLogger[F]
) {
  def download(textUrl: String, textFormat: String): F[String]
}
```

**`download` behavior:**
1. HTTP GET the `textUrl`
2. Validate response size against `config.maxContentBytes` (guard against unexpectedly large documents)
3. Extract plain text based on `textFormat`:

| Format | Content-Type | Extraction |
|--------|-------------|------------|
| `Formatted Text` | `text/html` | Strip HTML tags, decode entities, extract plain text body |
| `Formatted XML` | `application/xml` | Parse legislative XML, extract text content from structural elements |
| `PDF` | `application/pdf` | Extract text via Apache PDFBox. Stream-based extraction to avoid loading entire PDF into memory. |

4. Return extracted plain text as `String`

**HTML extraction (`Formatted Text`):** Strip all tags, preserve paragraph breaks as newlines, decode HTML entities (`&amp;` → `&`, etc.), trim excessive whitespace.

**XML extraction (`Formatted XML`):** Parse legislative XML with structural elements (`<section>`, `<subsection>`, `<paragraph>`, etc.). Extract text content preserving section structure (section headers become headings). Strip XML processing instructions and metadata elements.

**PDF extraction:** Use Apache PDFBox `PDFTextStripper`. Stream pages to avoid loading entire document into memory. Handle multi-column layouts. Preserve reading order.

**Size limit:** `config.maxContentBytes` (default: 10MB) prevents downloading unexpectedly large files. If response exceeds limit, raise `TextDownloadFailed` without consuming full body.

### `TextDownloadConfig`

```
final case class TextDownloadConfig(
  maxContentBytes: Long = 10 * 1024 * 1024,  // 10MB
  requestTimeout: FiniteDuration = 60.seconds
)
```

### Error Types

```
final case class TextDownloadFailed(
  textUrl: String,
  textFormat: String,
  detail: String,
  cause: Option[Throwable] = None
) extends Exception(
  s"Failed to download bill text from $textUrl (format: $textFormat): $detail",
  cause.orNull
)
```

### Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Downloads and extracts Formatted Text (HTML) | WireMock: serve HTML → returns stripped plain text |
| HTML entities decoded correctly | `&amp;`, `&lt;`, `&#167;` → proper characters |
| HTML tags fully stripped | `<p>text</p>` → `text` with no tags remaining |
| Paragraph breaks preserved as newlines | Multiple `<p>` blocks → separated by newlines |
| Downloads and extracts Formatted XML | WireMock: serve legislative XML → returns structured plain text |
| XML section structure preserved | `<section>` elements → section headings in output |
| XML metadata elements stripped | Processing instructions and metadata not in output |
| Downloads and extracts PDF | WireMock: serve PDF file → returns extracted text |
| PDF multi-page extraction | Multi-page PDF → all pages extracted |
| PDF reading order preserved | Two-column PDF → text in reading order |
| Content exceeding size limit raises error | WireMock: 20MB response, limit 10MB → `TextDownloadFailed` |
| Size limit does not consume full body | Large response → connection closed before full download |
| Unknown format raises `TextDownloadFailed` | Format `"Unknown"` → descriptive error |
| HTTP 404 raises `TextDownloadFailed` | WireMock: 404 → error with URL context |
| HTTP 500 triggers retry | WireMock: first 500, second 200 → succeeds |
| Network timeout raises error | WireMock: delay exceeding `requestTimeout` → `TextDownloadFailed` |
| Empty document produces empty string | WireMock: empty HTML body → `""` |
